# Kodingus

> Full-Stack Creative Developer. Design, build, and deploy — all in one.

This website is the personal portfolio and blog of Dedik, a Full-Stack Creative Developer. The content includes articles about software development, web performance, and server management.

- [Home](https://kodingus.com/)
- [Blog](https://kodingus.com/blog/)
- [Portfolio](https://kodingus.com/portfolio/)
